images.copyright: Coral reef and beach in Raja Ampat, Indonesia (© SergeUWPhoto/Shutterstock)
images.title: Small footprint, big impact
images.caption: Coral Reef Awareness Week
images.desc: Imagine a city built by animals, glowing in the sunlight, and bustling with life beneath the waves. That is a coral reef. During Coral Reef Awareness Week, we celebrate these remarkable ecosystems and the countless species that depend on them.

tooltips.walle: This image is not available to download as wallpaper.
